pages.title: Unrefined Crystal
pages.text: Drops from mined $(item)Crystal$() blocks. Refine via crafting or ritual into the polished crystal used in higher-tier recipes.

pages.title: Crystal Block
pages.text: A placeable block that recharges during a $(l:events/harvest_moon)Harvest Moon$(). Use bone meal on a depleted crystal to regrow it in daylight, or let it regenerate overnight on the correct phase.
